nasb.text: If your enemy is hungry, give him food to eat; And if he is thirsty, give him water to drink;

esv.text: If your enemy is hungry, give him bread to eat, and if he is thirsty, give him water to drink,

cnv.text: 如果你的仇敵餓了，就給他食物吃； 如果渴了，就給他水喝，

ccb.text: 你的仇敌若饿了， 就给他吃的； 若渴了，就给他水喝；

csbs.text: 如果恨你的人饿了，你当给他粮食吃； 如果他渴了，你当给他水喝；
